final:
module RefModule (
  input clk,
  input preset,
  input enable,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (preset) begin
      count <= 4'b0101;
    end
    else if (enable) begin
      count <= count + 1'b1;
    end
  end

endmodule
